title: Facebook Twitter Post translation thread
wikitext:
[]: Facebook/Twitter Post translation thread             Quote Post by Knuckles » Mon Aug 27, 2012 11:50 am Every time the official Evangelion facebook page makes a post, I immediately jump to all kinds of conclusions until i check this site, where I find no hints as to what it could be. Therefore I think it'd be a cool idea to have a thread specifically for those Facebook (and the linked Twitter account I'm assuming?) posts, letting us know what they're for. http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/rss_det.cgi?news_c=11231&newsctg_c=1002 this one was posted today a couple hours ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 27, 2012 3:18 pm The Eva quiz/puzzle event "Evangelion: The Mystery of the Missing Pilot(s)" is currently being held at Tokyo's Dome City Attractions until 9/17 (a Monday & national holiday). In honor of the event attracting over 10,000 participants, the campaign "2m 9cm from top to bottom. Try to solve the mystery of the massive Evangelion Unit-01!" is now running on Twitter. For further information, please see the official site. Original text: 現在、東京ドームシティ アトラクションズで9月17日（月・祝）まで行われている、 エヴァの謎解きイベント「ヱヴァンゲリヲン 消えたパイロットの謎」。 参加者1万人突破を記念し、「全高2m 9cm。迫力のエヴァンゲリオン初号機を謎を解いて当てよう！！」キャンペーンがTwitter上で実施中です。 詳しくは公式サイトをご覧ください。 EDIT: Thanks, Joe.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 4:14 pm Reichu wrote: [Dunno what （月・祝） is]

[]: Re: Facebook/Twitter Post translation thread             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon Aug 27, 2012 6:55 pm Knuckles wrote: Every time the official Evangelion facebook page makes a post, I immediately jump to all kinds of conclusions until i check this site, where I find no hints as to what it could be.

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Mon Aug 27, 2012 9:22 pm haha no problem. so there's a massive Eva 01 and it's... mysterious?!?

[]: I am             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 9:34 pm I dint even know they had an offical page yet i have liked over 5 neon genesis evangelion pages and there are no posts.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon Aug 27, 2012 11:03 pm FYI, link to the official Facebook page: http://www.facebook.com/evangelion.co.jp

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Aug 28, 2012 11:39 pm It turns out i did know they had a page i am just never on facebook when they post.

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Thu Aug 30, 2012 3:31 am new post: http://www.facebook.com/evangelion.co.jp

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Thu Aug 30, 2012 7:05 am Google Translate: "3rd Evangelion Original Movie chic × campaigns, Public buzz. This is a new two-book publishing on the theme of "Shave Guard" to prevent razor burn shaving agent. Supper "Ayanami" Ayanami think of Gendou. And what you want to convey to Gendou it? ? "A New Strategy" You are given a mission from Seele it? Gendou will start to move towards the implementation of new strategy? !" Granted, Reichu and others can translate this so it's coherent, but this is a quick reference. I'm curious what the last paragraph, in particular, means. Is it in relation to this Chic campaign, or is it something else?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 30, 2012 11:21 am The noise:signal ratio on these announcements is, you will quickly find, disastrously high. シック×ヱヴァンゲリヲンキャンペーン、話題のオリジナルムービー第3弾が公開中。 今回はカミソリ負けを防ぐシェービング剤「シェーブガード」をテーマに新たに2本公開です。 「綾波の晩餐」 ゲンドウを思う綾波。ゲンドウに伝えたい事とは？？ 「新たなる作戦」 ゼーレから与えられた使命とは？ゲンドウが新たな作戦遂行へむけて動きだす？！ The much-talked-about third original movie* for the Schick x Evangelion campaign is currently being released. Two new booklets [?] on the subject of "Shave Guard", a shaving formulation that prevents razor rash, will be published. [*Third installment of original movie s , possibly?] "Ayanami's Dinner" Ayanami is thinking about Gendo. What is it that she wants to tell him? "A New Strategy" An order has been bequeathed by Seele? Gendo starts to move to a new strategy?! ----- [Yes, yes, Gendo will be shaving his beard off using Schick's patented Shave Guard (R). We get the picture. If you want your soul to die badly enough, you can go to the campaign's actual page and see Eva-01 scratching her prosthetic chin as if she could use a good shave. Also, a couple of the 'movies' . Ugh.]

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Tue Sep 04, 2012 12:08 pm Nope.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Tue Sep 04, 2012 7:50 pm Pretty much, but some of it is relevant in some context as they put up ticketing information for November a number of weeks ago (Which theaters were screening and where to buy tickets). That was useful. For me anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Sep 04, 2012 11:30 pm Fallingtogrey wrote: Whenever I see "new info" posted by the facebook page I start thinking it's something relevant. Then it turns out it's just a new Evangelion Tooth Brush when I put it in google translate. I doubt we'll get any relevant information from the facebook page. They only seem to care about merchandise and promoting Eva through themed motor bikes.

[]:             Quote Post by PolarisX » Thu Sep 06, 2012 4:47 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: How many car tires and deodorant sticks does an Anime need before it's considered too much?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Sep 06, 2012 11:29 pm PolarisX wrote: Evangelion tires?! I'd buy em'

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Sep 20, 2012 2:58 pm Anno will be the guest during Subaru's Dramatic Cinema interview segment of Friday Road Show this week. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 22, 2012 5:29 pm I wonder what the interview segment was like? I'm assuming it didn't mention much about Q but maybe something?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Sep 22, 2012 11:52 pm I don't know what their format is like. If it's an interview of any length, not talking much about Q would be a major failing on Subaru's part.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Tue Sep 25, 2012 6:25 pm Video isn't available outside of Japan, but they finally labeled the subject as "Ultraman"
summary: []: Facebook/Twitter Post translation thread             Quote Post by Knuckles » Mon Aug 27, 2012 11:50 am Every time the official Evangelion facebook page makes a post, I immediately jump to all kinds of conclusions until i check this site, where I find no hints as to what it could be. Therefore I think it'd be a cool idea to have a thread specifically for those Facebook (and the linked Twitter account I'm assuming?) posts
